name: Daily Report via Telegram
description: Triggers an n8n workflow that sends a daily summary via Telegram.
prompt: Find the n8n workflow named '{workflowName}' and trigger it. Then check the execution result and tell me if it succeeded or failed. If it failed, describe what went wrong based on the execution data.

params.name: workflowName
params.description: Exact name of the n8n workflow to trigger
